query:
-- Normalize all remaining non-E.164 phone numbers in clients table
-- Strip all non-digits, then add +1 prefix for 10-digit US numbers
UPDATE clients
SET phone = CASE
  WHEN LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 10 
    THEN '+1' || REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  WHEN LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 11 
    AND LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1) = '1'
    THEN '+' || REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  ELSE phone
END
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL 
  AND phone != ''
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Verify
SELECT id, localId, name, phone FROM clients WHERE id = 2070001;
